description_long: This helmet features a sleek, rounded shell with a high-gloss metallic red finish and prominent gold facial plating, reminiscent of the Iron Man character from Marvel Comics. The front faceplate is angular with defined eye slits and a mouth slit, all highlighted in gold, while the rest of the helmet is a deep, reflective red. The sides of the helmet have large, circular ear openings, and the back is smooth and unadorned. The surface is highly polished, giving it a mirror-like shine and a premium, futuristic appearance. There are no visible ventilation holes, retention systems, or additional attachments. The helmet appears to be made primarily of a hard, rigid material, likely plastic or composite, with a hollow interior for head placement.
description: A glossy, metallic red and gold helmet with a smooth, rounded shell and angular gold faceplate, inspired by Iron Man. The helmet has a highly reflective surface and prominent facial features.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the gold faceplate, red shell, and large circular ear opening.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted red surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the gold faceplate and ear opening visible.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the angular gold faceplate, eye and mouth slits, and the overall Iron Man motif.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a bold, two-tone metallic design with a solid red shell and gold faceplate, styled after the Iron Man character. No additional patterns, text, or imagery are present.
